title: Export & Import Pipelines as Templates
overview: A Pipeline is created with a collection of #Batch Executables to move DSP configurations between orgs. Use Export to download the Pipeline setup as a JSON file, then Import that JSON into another Pipeline (with a Template Direction specified) to recreate the same process.
generalUseCase: Use Pipeline Export to package DSP configurations into reusable deployment templates—either to share data-driven, standardized setups for industry solutions (e.g., Data Sync Pro, Revenue Cloud or nCino) or to manually migrate DSP configurations between environments (e.g., DEV to QA) for lightweight, small-team deployments.
